summary: Iteration 3 — Saved Chats Pin/Search + Shared Chat QR. Tested backend PATCH /api/ai/conversations/{id} (pin/unpin, sort, 404, 401, 400) and GET pinned field — 7/7 pass. Re-ran saved_chats_share regression — 11/11 pass. Frontend: seeded chats via API, verified saved-chats-search filters live, saved-chats-no-results renders when no match, saved-chat-pin pins bottom chat to top, saved-chat-pinned-badge appears, persistence holds across reload, unpin removes badge. Opened share URL in anonymous browser context — shared-chat-page + shared-chat-thread render with no auth, QR toggle hides initially, click reveals shared-chat-qr panel whose starts with https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/ and encodes the exact window.location.href (URL-encoded). Toggle again hides it.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_routes.py:379 uses find_one_and_update(return_document=True). Motor accepts the truthy bool and behaves as ReturnDocument.AFTER today, but the idiomatic call is `return_document=pymongo.ReturnDocument.AFTER`. Functionally fine (tests confirm post-update doc is returned), but worth tightening for clarity.

SavedChats.jsx:88 sort comparator uses `(!!b.pinned - !!a.pinned)` which works but is non-obvious; comparator returning the same diff twice is functionally correct only because both branches share sign. Consider `Number(b.pinned) - Number(a.pinned)` for readability.

SharedChat.jsx QR uses external service api.qrserver.com — no fallback if the third-party is unreachable. Low risk for an optional gifting feature, but a graceful onError handler that hides the panel or shows the URL would be nicer.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (search, no-results, pin, persistence, unpin, share, QR show/hide, QR src encoding)

seed_data_creation: Seeded 2 test conversations (TEST_pin_chat_A/B for backend, TEST_pin_gift_under_50/TEST_pin_birthday_ideas + TEST_qr_share_chat for UI). All seeded data cleaned up via DELETE after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 (Pin/Search + QR) is fully verified. New testids in play: saved-chats-search, saved-chats-no-results, saved-chat-pin, saved-chat-pinned-badge, shared-chat-qr-toggle, shared-chat-qr. Backend PATCH endpoint is /api/ai/conversations/{cid} with body {pinned?:bool, title?:str}. Anonymous shared-chat page now loads (was OK in iter 2) and the QR toggle is hidden by default. The 401 console errors seen on the anonymous /share/chat page come from Navbar's /api/auth/me probe, NOT from /api/ai/share/{token} — that public endpoint returns 200 as expected.
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration.
